x86_64-linux-musl GCC toolchain
===============================

This directory vendors a prebuilt x86_64-linux-musl GCC cross toolchain from
musl.cc for x86_64 Linux hosts.

The vendored archive is:

    x86_64-linux-musl-cross.tgz

It was downloaded from:

    https://more.musl.cc/x86_64-linux-musl/x86_64-linux-musl-cross.tgz

The unpacked archive root is expected to be:

    x86_64-linux-musl-cross/

The compiler entrypoint used by runme.sh is:

    x86_64-linux-musl-cross/bin/x86_64-linux-musl-cc

Observed toolchain version:

    GCC 11.2.1 20211120

SHA256:

    c6226824d6b7214ce974344b186179c9fa89be3c33dd7431c4b6585649ce840b
